subcodes.title: Risala fi'l-Tasdid
subcodes.first_line: Know thou—may God make firm thy footsteps upon the Path—that God, glorified and exalted be He, is the All-Sufficient and Perfect One, and that His creation, from the moment He fashioned it, when the Pen moved and destiny ordained it to its perfection, was such that no imperfection could be found therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اعلم ثبت الله قدمیک علی الصراط ان الله سبحانه تعالی غنی کامل و ان مصنوعه حین ما اصنع جری القلم و قدرها القدر علی کماله بحیث لانقص فیه .....
subcodes.subjects: @perfection; imperfection of nature, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @power of the Manifestation of God
